Hyperlipidemia clinical management plan23-Jan-2021Hyperlipidemia
  • Achieve and maintain LDL cholesterol below 1.8 mmol/L to reduce cardiovascular risk.
  • Achieve and maintain total cholesterol below 4.0 mmol/L.
  • Maintain HDL cholesterol above 1.0 mmol/L.
  • Achieve and maintain triglycerides below 1.7 mmol/L.
Discharge care plan28-Jan-2009-
Diabetes self management plan26-Dec-1992Prediabetes
  • Patient will verbalize understanding of prediabetes, lifestyle modifications, and self-monitoring strategies.
  • Maintain hemoglobin A1c below diabetes threshold.
  • Achieve at least 5% weight loss from baseline to reduce risk of progression to diabetes.
  • Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week.
  • Follow a balanced diet with reduced intake of saturated fats and added sugars, and increased fiber.
